title: optimized PRO_MAXX
description: mods for mainly boosting fps  combats experience for pvp and best FPS which can help you guys to do alot better at cpvp pvp all of that stuff
body:
This modpack makes Minecraft more fun without changing what makes it great. It adds useful features, smoother gameplay, and small improvements that make everything feel better to play.

You can build, explore, and progress at your own pace. The mods are chosen to work well together, so the game feels balanced and not confusing. Nothing is added just for the sake of it.

It works well for both singleplayer and servers, runs smoothly, and is good for long-term worlds. If you want a Minecraft experience that feels fresh, simple, and enjoyable, this modpack is for you,for any inquiry feel free to contact me on discord my discord id is rayyan_3. and I will make more modpack in future if i get good results regar this pack,THANK YOU                                                             
    ~Rayyan
